summary: The implementation successfully addresses REQ-11 by changing the hero section text to yellow color with appropriate text shadows for visibility. All requested text elements have been updated to use the new 'text-hero-yellow' class with enhanced text shadows for readability against the background image.

hallucinated_features.description: Addition of new CSS color token '--hero-yellow' in global styles (index.css) and Tailwind configuration
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only specified changing text to yellow color but did not explicitly request creation of new color tokens or configuration changes. The implementation added infrastructure beyond the minimal requirement of changing text color.
